description: Send notifications to your own NotificationAPI destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise napi:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native NotificationAPI sender payload delivered straight to api.notificationapi.com.
name: msg-to-notificationapi

request.template: {"urls":"napi://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_secret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"type":"apprise","user":{"id":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "notify") *}},"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" ) and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

{"type":"apprise","user":{"id":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "notify") *}},"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" ) and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
